mapper.sql: USER_ID, COUPON_ID, COUPON_STATE, APPLY_TIME, USE_TIME, MEMO, USERCOUPON_ID
mapper.update:
update
set USER_ID = #{USER_ID}, COUPON_ID = #{COUPON_ID}, COUPON_STATE = #{COUPON_STATE}, APPLY_TIME = #{APPLY_TIME}, USE_TIME = #{USE_TIME}, MEMO = #{MEMO}, USERCOUPON_ID = USERCOUPON_ID where USERCOUPON_ID = #{USERCOUPON_ID}
